title: FLYSKI Shuttle - FlySki Shuttle
original_text:
COME AND RIDE WITH US, FROM THE AIRPORT TO THE SLOPES OF THE DOLOMITES
Collective Transfer reservations are closed, the Private Transfer service is active every day of the year
Collective Transfer bookings for the 2025-26 winter season are open!
The Private Transfer service is available every day of the year
PACK YOUR BAGS, WE’LL DO THE REST!
Experience a comfortable and convenient journey to the Dolomites aboard our Private Transfer. Select the schedule that best suits your arrival and departure times.
Experience a comfortable and convenient journey to Trentino’s ski slopes aboard our Shuttle service. Select the schedule that best suits your arrival and departure times.
EASY
Let us handle your airport or train station transfer. Just book your ride, and we’ll be there to take you to your destination.
COMFORTABLE
We tailor each transfer to the number of passengers booked, to ensure a pleasant journey for all our guests.
DIRECT
With our extensive route network, traveling between northern Italy’s airports and train stations and Trentino’s ski resorts is easy and relaxing.
Verona Airport
Bergamo Airport
Venice Airport
Milan Train Station/Airport
Trento Train Station
Bolzano Airport
Treviso Airport
Fassa Valley
Sole Valley
Madonna di Campiglio
Fiemme Valley
San Martino di Castrozza
Garda Lake
Paganella
Valsugana
Are you a Professional Operator and want to have access to the confidential rates reserved for you?
Contact us!
